categories.coverage: All retained local remote refs at capture time.
categories.limitation: Local refs cannot prove remote completeness or deleted refs.

categories.coverage: Topology and commit metadata reachable from pinned HEAD.
categories.limitation: No assertion of complete remote history or all historical blob availability.

categories.coverage: Two unauthenticated public PR-index API responses captured locally: each returned 76 items at per_page=100 with no Link header. The later dedicated capture is retained under SRC-0013 with SHA-256 91da08d7e0e89bd62d2b86b39cf8d6c4aad48a4c66c1663b808ffa0a0277b869.
categories.limitation: The local captures are timestamped and hashed but do not include every PR detail, PR file page, or matching public commit response; they cannot prove deleted, private, permission-dependent, or subsequently changed PR history.

categories.coverage: One unauthenticated public API response captured locally: 99 items at per_page=100 with no Link header.
categories.limitation: The local capture is timestamped and hashed but cannot prove deleted, private, permission-dependent, or subsequently changed issue history.

categories.coverage: One unauthenticated public API response captured locally: 0 items at per_page=100 with no Link header.
categories.limitation: The local capture is timestamped and hashed but cannot prove deleted, private, permission-dependent, or subsequently changed release history.

comparison_policy: Merge-commit aggregate diffs use first-parent comparison unless a later public capture declares another policy.
limitations: A local promisor clone does not establish all public GitHub refs, PRs, issues, releases, reviews, pagination, or deleted history.
Zero missing objects reachable from HEAD at this capture does not establish complete historical blob coverage across remote history.
Commit subjects and diff scope are evidence of recorded changes, not product strategy, provider intent, or runtime behavior.
